training_set.description: Training points for regression. Shapes: x_train (200, 1), u_train (200, 1).
training_set.loading_instructions: Use np.load('train_data.npz'). Access via data['x_train'] and data['u_train']

validation_set.description: Validation points for evaluation. Shapes: x_val (500, 1), u_val (500, 1).
validation_set.loading_instructions: Use np.load('val_data.npz'). Access via data['x_val'] and data['u_val']
